name: Royal Plumbing Services Ltd.
address: 614 Dufferin St, Toronto, ON M6K 2A9, Canada

reviews.author: A Graham
reviews.text: Called in an issue with our sink and was immediately connected to Matthew who told us exactly what he could do to help and was able to provide us an estimate cost. He was communicative and updated us every step of the way. When he completed the task he was clean, prompt, efficient and friendly. Great experience with the company! Highly recommend to anyone needing their service. Thanks again!

reviews.author: Christine Han
reviews.text: After doing some renovations, I needed new pipes and a faucet installed. Matthew was quick, professional, and did a great job. The pricing was also very reasonable compared to other plumbers in the area. I’m super happy with the service and would absolutely recommend them!

reviews.author: Lana Belle
reviews.text: Matt was an absolute dream to work with - fast, efficient, and completely fair in his pricing. On top of that, he was genuinely friendly and easy to have in our home. We feel lucky to have found him and fully expect he’ll be our plumber for life. I wouldn’t hesitate for a second to recommend him to anyone looking for a true professional.

reviews.author: vivian maidiotis
reviews.text: Matt did a great job installing the pipes under my sink. He was fast, efficient and very friendly. I would highly recommend him to future clients.

reviews.author: Vladimir Merino
reviews.text: Mathew did a fantastic job repairing our under mount sink. Quick, friendly and efficient service. We will be recommending him and Royal Plumbing to our friends and family.

name: Priority Plumbing & Drains
address: 1594 Dupont St, Toronto, ON M6P 3S7, Canada

reviews.author: Alvin T.
reviews.text:
Will not use again because of steep pricing

**Note:
Just want to raise some red flags here based on the company's response after my original review:

(1) "The faucet installed was not a big-box retail model and is not sold at Home Depot. It is a higher-quality fixture. ... ... and long-term performance. The stainless finish also adds to the cost."

Red flag -  The technician had reassured us numerous times on the day of the service that the "stainless finish" costs the same as the chrome or other finish.This shows that the company has aggressively marked up the faucet or overcharged for their labor. The "higher-quality" faucet shown in the picture below should not cost you more than $500 as per Home Depot, even though it is not available through the retailer.

(2) "Your total price included ... ... the enrollment in a pre paid maintenance plan, plus all the applicable taxes."

Red flag - We were not made aware, clearly informed  or provided  with any copy of the "enrollment in a prepaid maintenance plan" as things were explained quickly and vaguely on a tablet by the technician and no such detail had ever been brought up. On top of that, the invoice did not mention any enrolment plan at all. In fact, the invoice with the Terms & Conditions was only emailed to us 30 mins after the technician left. Basically I was asked to sign something (on a tablet) that I had not been shown other than the signature box. Please make sure you ask and go through those important details to protect your consumer rights, as they were not very upfront about during the service call.
(updated on Feb 12, 2026)

Original review:
This was a weekday, non-emergency service call for a seized emergency shutoff hot water valve and slow-flowing hot water that costs us a total of $1939.22, after a “member savings” of $179.57 discount as indicated in the invoice.

The whole process took close to 2 hours from 9 to 11am, with 1 hour spent on the actual repair and replacement of two water valves + a new kitchen faucet (Moen brand regular pull down faucet, retail price ~ $250-$300 at Home Depot), the remaining time was spent on inspections, quote discussions and upselling.

The technician showed up on time to start off with a “full-system check” looking for potential plumbing issues within the house, even if you called them in for just one issue. Personally I thought it was great to have a professional plumber to go through and check the plumbing, and if you are comfortable with being upsold with various other services afterwards.

The technician was very personable and professional and we were happy with his service throughout, and our place was kept clean at the end of the repair. The repair/ replacement itself was a straightforward job, the undersink was cleared for the technician without any obstruction before he started. There was enough space to work around and it was an easy access to the valves and faucet.

We initially chose Priority Plumbing because we wanted to support local businesses as they are located in the community. We assumed that their pricing would be competitive and reasonable hence we did not think twice before agreeing to what the technician was proposing and quoting us. At the end of the day, we wanted it to be done by a reliable company that has been around for years.

Will we use them again? Probably not after finding out that there are better pricings out there for the same work which would cost way less than $1900! We did later ask Priority Plumbing for a detailed cost breakdown of what we had paid for since they only emailed the invoice to us after the technician left, which was 30 minutes later.

Their customer service team later responded, “because we are not a time and material company, there is no hourly rate and therefore I have no way of breaking down the price into a time and material cost. We work on a flat rate, upfront pricing system.”

So, you can decide for yourself if you want to pay a premium for a similar job that can be done by another company or licensed plumber for much less.

reviews.author: J
reviews.text:
Shoutout to Priority Plumbing, these guys are fantastic!

My Dad has used Priority Plumbing multiple times over the years, including two recent service calls to my grandpa’s apartment. Both experiences have been professional, thorough, and genuinely helpful.

They don’t just fix the immediate problem, they take the time to inspect the rest of the plumbing system and let you know about any potential issues down the road.

The first visit was great, and on the second one, we had Zachary come out. He replaced a worn-out fill valve? (The work was done a while ago and i forgot exactly what was done for the toilet, my bad) which had degraded over time from the harsh chemicals of a toilet tank cleaner (good to know and lesson learned. Avoid leaving those in the tank!).

While he was there, Zach also noticed a developing clog in the kitchen sink drain. The sink was still draining okay for now, but he explained that it would likely get worse over time and could become a much more expensive repair later. There was zero pressure or hard-sell tactics. Just clear, honest information so we could make an informed decision. We ended up having the pipes cleaned right then and there, as it felt like the smart proactive choice.

The whole team was excellent. The dispatcher (I unfortunately forgot her name) called ahead to ask if there was anything specific we wanted to mention, and I received a helpful text with a live tracking link so I knew exactly when Zach would arrive.

Overall, top-notch communication, honest advice, quality work, and no gimmicks. I’m not a homeowner yet, but when I am, Priority Plumbing will be my first call without hesitation!

reviews.author: Kylie Wasko
reviews.text:
Great service from start to finish. I really appreciated the text reminders and the phone calls with updated, accurate arrival times.

Cole Tubigan was knowledgeable, polite, and genuinely keen to help. It’s clear he enjoys his work and wants to do it well! All my questions were answered, and any concerns I had were thoroughly reviewed.

Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Helen Seto
reviews.text:
First time using Priority Plumbing.  Their plumber Zachary T. provided me with excellent service.  He called me prior to his arrival.  He diagnosed and provided me with multiple estimate options on various issues.

We agreed to replace a kitchen faucet and repair a bathroom toilet for me. His service was very professional, timely and very tidy.

Zachary exceeded my expectations and was very easy to work with and I would confidently recommend him for plumbing issues.

Thank you Zachary.

reviews.author: Carla Daniele
reviews.text:
Our experience with Zachary Tsuruda was fantastic from start to finish. From the moment he arrived until the second he left, he was professional, kind, and extremely thorough. He took the time to clearly explain all the work that needed to be done and provided us with different estimates for our sump pump and the under-the-sink leak, which we really appreciated.

Zachary left everything clean and tidy, and his customer service was excellent throughout the entire visit. Priority Plumbing arrived exactly when they said they would, and this continues to match our past experiences with them, we have used Priority Plumbing before and have always received great service.

We highly recommend Zachary Tsuruda and Priority Plumbing.

name: Leaside Plumbing and Heating Ltd
address: 205 Wicksteed Ave Unit 20, Toronto, ON M4G 0B1, Canada

reviews.author: Mark F
reviews.text: Great experience.  Keith arrived on time and immediately got to work and within a few minutes had everything fixed and working great.  The communication with the office is smooth and easy as well.  Basically from the time I called for a plumber to the time Keith fixed the issue was smooth, professional and quick.  Highly recommend Leaside Plumbing.

reviews.author: Rita Richards
reviews.text: As always, I have trusted Leaside Plumbing and Heating for years for all our plumbing needs! Thank you Jonathan, you did an outstanding job re-installing our dishwasher and looking after all the plumbing for our new kitchen sink and faucet. I highly recommend LP&H!

reviews.author: T&L Gibbings
reviews.text:
I requested service to inspect the sump pump and backflow valve before closing on the purchase of a home. Keith was the individual that serviced us. He communicated well. He was punctual as timing was critical.
Keith was prompt in getting back to us on the requests we made.
Thank you Keith and Leaside Plumbing

reviews.author: N. Farrell
reviews.text: The work done by Leaside plumbing was excellent. They were professional, careful, solved the problem, only did the work necessary and explained every step of the process.  They also informed me in advance of the potential cost, and, in the end It was accurate. I specifically want to recognize workmanship and professionalism of Drew.  Thank you.

reviews.author: Martin Wade
reviews.text: We have hired Leaside Plumbing for many things over the past several years.  Most recently they repaired a leaky valve at our outdoor hose bib.  They are always courteous, professional and reliable.  We especially appreciate the communication, for example receiving a text to let us know they are en route.  We have recommended them to friends and neighbours and wouldn’t hesitate to call on them for our future plumbing needs.

name: Everest Drain & Plumbing Toronto
address: 31 Commercial Rd, Toronto, ON M4G 1Z3, Canada

reviews.author: sunil karki
reviews.text:
I had a pipe burst a few days ago and contacted several companies, but Everest Drain and Plumbing was the only one that could clearly confirm how soon they could attend to the issue. They offered me a 9:00 AM appointment the following morning and arrived right on time — even a bit early.

I truly appreciated the prompt response, professionalism, and fair pricing. The service was efficient, and everything was handled smoothly.

I would definitely choose Everest again for any future plumbing needs.

Thank you, Everest, for your excellent and reliable service!

reviews.author: Janet Morrissey
reviews.text:
I had a pipe burst a few days before Christmas - tis the season. Out of the companies that I contacted, Everest was the only company that could confirm how soon they'd be able to attend to the issue. They offered an appointment for 9am the following morning and Indra was prompt, if not early.

We were very appreciative with his service, and I would go directly with them for future plumbing issues/needs.

Thank you Indra and Everest for your prompt service and pricing.

reviews.author: Mausam Limbu
reviews.text: The main drain line was blocked, and Everest came the next morning as promised. They cleared it up quickly and made everything clear. Great service and a fair price. I would call them again.

reviews.author: Kp Oli
reviews.text:
Had a pipe burst and Everest was the only company that confirmed a next day appointment. They arrived on time, fixed the issue quickly and the pricing was fair.

Great service, highly recommend!

reviews.author: Iris
reviews.text: I recently had the pleasure of working with Everest Drain & Plumbing in Toronto, and I could not be more impressed with their exceptional service! From the moment we called them for assistance with plumbing work, I knew it was in good hands. Aly was punctual, with something we always appreciate. Not only professional but also incredibly knowledgeable about the problem. He explained in detail and made me understand before moving forward. The work was completed with the highest level of craftsmanship. One of the standard aspects of Everest Drain & Plumbing is their fair and upfront pricing. The pricing was reasonable for the quality of work provided, and I appreciated their transparency. What truly sets them apart is their outstanding customer service. Aly made sure to clean up after all the work completed, and there were no surprises when the work was done. I was overall impressed by how well Aly managed the entire process from diagnosing to resolution. If you are looking for a trustworthy, skilled and professional Plumbing company look no further. They have earned a loyal customer in me!

name: Premier Plumbing
address: 196 Divadale Dr, East York, ON M4G 2P7, Canada

reviews.author: Michael De Luca
reviews.text: We had an emergency due to a clogged kitchen drain from several years worth of debris build up from a garbage disposal, and Sulaiman was prompt and took great care with the work environment and repairs. He came in, diagnosed the issue, explained it very clearly, resolved it quickly, and cleaned everything up before leaving. He was very helpful and straightforward about the process and DIY tips for maintenance.

reviews.author: Jim McCaffrey
reviews.text: I recently had my water tank replaced and overall I’m very happy with the service.  When the team first arrived they brought the wrong tank by mistake. However, they handled the situation professionally and took care of the issue right away without any hassle.  They quickly arranged for the correct tank, kept me informed throughout the process and made sure everything was installed properly. The technicians were courteous, efficient, and respectful of my home. It’s clear they care about customer satisfaction and stand behind their work. I truly appreciate how promptly they resolved the mixup and I wouldn’t hesitate to recommend this company for their honesty and commitment to making things right.   Thanks for a job well done.  Cheers.

reviews.author: James Chan
reviews.text: Alan and his team were true professionals—communicative, efficient, and knowledgeable. They expertly updated the plumbing in our 100-year-old home and changed a wide faucet with minimal disruption. I especially appreciated their effort to keep the work area clean throughout the project. I will definitely continue to rely on Premier Plumbing for all future plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Peter C
reviews.text:
I really appreciated Nick’s knowledge, professionalism and honesty in his service call to my home.  Nick patiently stepped me through the condition of my home’s drainage system using a camera scope, and we came up with a reasonable plan going forward.  This service was also done at a very reasonable cost!

I plan to continue using Premier Plumbing’s services in the future as a result.

reviews.author: Nick Stitt
reviews.text: Outstanding service.  Rene repaired a plastic water supply line going to my bathroom.  I had cut a hole in it while doing renovations in an adjoining room.  The pipe was in the wall and difficult to reach.  Rene made what looked to be a very difficult job look easy.  He did a proper, permanent repair job.  And on top of that,  he was really personable.  I couldn't ask for more.

name: Drain King Plumbers Toronto
address: 100 St Regis Crescent S #8, North York, ON M3J 1Y8, Canada

reviews.author: masoud zhian
reviews.text:
I rarely leave reviews, but this experience has been extremely frustrating and costly.

I contacted this company for a recurring basement drain backup. After multiple visits, I was given different explanations each time, and each visit resulted in additional recommendations and charges, without a lasting fix.

I was first told the T-connection was the issue, which I replaced at my own expense. That did not resolve the problem. I was then told the kitchen and basement lines required flushing/hydro jetting.

A technician later suggested completing the hydro jet privately for cash, which I declined. I paid the company directly for the hydro jet service instead. When the technician returned, he initially refused to hydro jet the kitchen. After I insisted that the paid service be completed, the work appeared rushed and very brief.

Three days later, the kitchen sink backed up again. Another technician advised that the kitchen line was still full of grease and required proper hydro jetting, indicating the previously paid service was not completed as invoiced.

Since November 6, 2025, I have repeatedly tried to resolve this with the office. Promised callbacks never happened, calls are no longer being answered, and as of January 22, 2026, my kitchen remains unusable.

Based on my experience, I would caution others to be very careful and to get clear documentation of what work is actually being performed.

reviews.author: Temesgen M
reviews.text: Excellent experience getting our faucet replaced. The plumber was friendly, respectful, and did a great job. No mess left behind and the new faucet works flawlessly. Would definitely use this company again.

reviews.author: Emil Kadric
reviews.text: Drain Kings did an outstanding job. Fast response, straight answers, and zero nonsense. They showed up on time, handled the issue professionally, and left everything cleaner than they found it. You can tell they take pride in their work. Reliable, efficient, and worth every dollar. I wouldn’t hesitate to call them again.

reviews.author: Ion Iancu
reviews.text:
Your employee uncloged the drain using the "snake". He tried to untighten a nut for making room for the snake. He could not untighten the nut neither by hand nor using the pliers. He banged in the connection hoping to succeed. It did not work and then he cut the long drain pipe.
He succefuly uncloged the drain. He connected the cut drain pipe using the rubber connector, he reconnected everthing back as seen in the attached picture.For the moment everything was working, but next morning under the sink I found a lot of water. I called Drain King and I was connected with your employee
I asked him to come and take a look and see what the problem might be and fix it.
He kept me a lecture about what might be and refused to come and fix the issue.Now I have to call another plumber to fix the problem.
I am sorry, but this is not a professional aproach by Drain King.
For this reason I cannot give more than 2 stars.

reviews.author: Christine Aiken
reviews.text: Our plumber was very nice and informed about our situation we were quoted $600+ to fix the drain in our bathroom sink. Work completed well in a timely manner (very quickly). My sons thought it was a very expensive repair for the time involved, eldest son said he had the machine and call him if it happens again this is an old house with old galvanized pipes

name: Plumber To Your Door of Toronto
address: 509 Bloor St W, Toronto, ON M5S 1Y2, Canada

reviews.author: Tyrone Hill
reviews.text:
Can't recommend Emil highly enough! He was available on short notice, which was a massive relief for me. Emil arrived right on time and was incredibly easy to communicate with throughout the entire process.

He quickly assessed the issue with my toilet, explained what needed to be done, and replaced the part in a matter of minutes. I appreciate how dedicated he was to resolving the problem efficiently. Now, my toilet works perfectly!

The entire experience was hassle-free, and Emil's professionalism and friendly demeanour made it even more enjoyable. Excellent service overall—thank you, Emil! If you need a reliable plumber, he's definitely the one to call.

reviews.author: Danny Oliveira
reviews.text: George and his crew are the absolute best in the business! We have relied on George for the past 2 years for both our personal homes and to refer him to our clients and he has always been exceptional with the service he provides. From helping install sump pumps, fixing toilets, kitchen sink plumbing, George is honest, trustworthy and we will continue to refer him to our friends, family, clients and fellow real estate colleagues.  Thank you George and the Plumber to your Door team!

reviews.author: Oliver Normanton
reviews.text: My shower broke and George was here within a couple of hours. He quickly diagnosed the issue and fixed it immediately. Extremely professional, friendly, and efficient. I couldn’t recommend him more highly.

reviews.author: Paul Mattila
reviews.text:
I rarely write reviews, to the best of my knowledge, I'd say 3 to 4 in my 59yrs.
My father was a master carpenter and I followed him into the trades for a decade plus, I can say George and his crew do incredible work!
Starting from George himself to his crew, it's like when you ask a friend for a referral on someone to fix X and they refer you to someone or someone that a friend used.
I just know the difference between value and price and I got both from George (great guy by the way) in the services he provided on not only for myself but other clients that we've provided his contact details to......

Thanks

Paul M

reviews.author: Erin Mantis
reviews.text: Every time we call George comes to the rescue and he solves the problem at hand even when we don't know what is happening.  He is always friendly and kind and we feel we are in good hands!  It is nice to trust someone!

name: Brothers Plumbing
address: 130 Osler St, Toronto, ON M6N 2Y8, Canada

reviews.author: Erick Edmonds Odhiambo Ogallo
reviews.text: Great experience with a very knowledgeable pro. My kitchen sink was backing up significantly and I was concerned about the complexity of the fix. Fortunately, the technician knew exactly what to do. He handled the situation with ease, cleared the line, and was incredibly friendly throughout the process. It's a relief to work with someone so competent and reliable.

reviews.author: Weldon Kipkoech
reviews.text: Incredible service. These guys really know their stuff and pay close attention to every little detail. It's a relief to hire a professional crew that actually delivers. You can rest easy knowing that whatever they work on will be handled with expert care and won't require a redo. Solid, reliable work, I wouldn't go anywhere else.

reviews.author: Génesis Montes
reviews.text: They did a fantastic job with my toilet installation. The plumber was professional, explained the process, and made sure everything worked perfectly. Super smooth service from a trustworthy local company.

reviews.author: Irene
reviews.text: I had a great experience with them.From the first call to the job being completed,  everything was handled professionally and efficiently

reviews.author: Mercy Jepchirchir
reviews.text: Fantastic service. They came quickly and on the same morning I called and cleared a tough drain clog. Super friendly, fast, and professional. Thank you.

name: New Canadian Drain and Plumbing Ltd
address: 184 St Helens Ave, Toronto, ON M6H 4A1, Canada

reviews.author: Lucas Tromly
reviews.text: Excellent work at better than normal prices. Samad Nikpay informed me of all my options and gave great advice without pressuring me. He came out within an hour of our call on a Sunday of a long holiday weekend.

reviews.author: Eva Yasinsky
reviews.text:
Samad came promptly and explained everything throughly on estimate. He did a fantastic job, very quick and left the bathroom very clean. Broke up the boxes and disassembled old toliet in 2 piece easier for us to take to curb on garbage day.
No issues in repeat business , will use again.

reviews.author: Devendra Wagh
reviews.text: I had an excellent experience with New Canadian Drain & Plumbing. A huge thank you to BK Lee, who went above and beyond to help me with a difficult plumbing issue. He was incredibly genuine and polite, and even came by late in the evening after his regular hours to make sure the job was done. It is rare to find such dedicated professionals these days. Highly recommend BK Lee and the team for their outstanding service!

reviews.author: kara fraser
reviews.text: We had to replace a leaky facet in our bathroom. As usual, New Canadian Drain and Plumbing was there to take the job. It was quick, and it was a job well done. I always appreciate the transparency when it comes to the pricing and quote so I always know what I am getting into. I want to give an extra shout out to Samad who was the plumber who did the installation. He explained everything very clearly and showed me the work once completed so I have peace of mind it was done well. Highly recommend 👌

reviews.author: Jodie Ngan
reviews.text: Samad provided incredible service!! We had a blockage in our toilet. He came in less than 12 hour, and was very thorough in the explanation of the root cause of the blockage and transparent about the cost. Not only did he help us unblock the toilet, but he also went over and above in solving the root cause of the problem which was our refill valve, which he replaced immediately.

name: True Service Plumbing
address: 180 Brock Ave, Toronto, ON M6K 2L6, Canada

reviews.author: Aaron Langemann
reviews.text:
Today we needed to get some pipes repaired in our basement.  I contacted True Service Plumbing and within minutes was able to speak to Nico.  He was very pleasant over the phone and let me know he would be there within the hour - which he was.  He did a review of the situation we had and explained everything to me crystal clear and provided the quote upfront (very reasonable).  I proceeded with the work and he let me know he would be about an hour - and to my surprise he was very accurate in his time estimate.  Nico was very friendly and open to answer any questions I had - about the current issue and otherwise and gave me tips for future work or plumbing.  I highly recommend and look forward to working with True Service and Nico in the future.  Thank you very much for your time today!

Aaron.

reviews.author: Martin Price
reviews.text: Niko was amazing! He showed up, assessed the situation, went out to get supplies, came back and had my leaking pipe fixed within minutes. Truly amazing. Highly recommend True Service Plumbing, and Niko, for all of your plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Natalie Wallace
reviews.text:
Had a great experience with Nico. He’ll be the first plumber we call if/when another issue arises.

We had received a consultation from another plumber and his recommendation for how to solve the issue didn’t sit right with us. We called Nico for a second opinion. He diagnosed the issue quickly, was very transparent about our options, and helped educate us on why the previous plumber’s recommendation wasn’t solid.

We went forward with Nico and he competed the repairs the next day, exactly as he had promised. He was courteous and clearly cared about ensuring the project was done well. Quality and care!

reviews.author: Noah McKenzie
reviews.text: Would highly recommend this company to anyone that needs plumbing services done. I was able to get someone to fix one of my pipes a few hours after I called the company. Niko, the technician that was sent was excellent and was extremely knowledgeable and professional.  Niko immediately went out and got parts needed to complete the job instead of coming back another day. He got the job done quickly and efficiently.

reviews.author: TK Lee
reviews.text:
We unfortunately discovered several issues with the main plumbing system under our master bathroom and laundry room, as well as the stormwater drain, that were not up to code. Niko diligently fixed everything, and he has now become our go-to plumber. He has been consistently responsive, efficient, and reliable.

What we appreciate most is how strict and principled he is when it comes to code compliance. After dealing with what was most likely poor workmanship from an unlicensed plumber in the past, I learned how crucial it is to hire the right professional—especially for plumbing and roofing, which are among the most important aspects of home maintenance because they directly relate to water damage prevention and life safety.

Niko always shows up, assesses the situation carefully, and resolves issues quickly. His professionalism is clear from every interaction. Raymond has also been excellent—whenever I contacted him to book appointments or ask questions, he was responsive and helpful. Thank you both for the great service.

name: Bubby's Plumbing
address: 1074 Crawford Ave, Windsor, ON N9A 5C9, Canada

reviews.author: Dory Mills
reviews.text: Alex and Dan were timely, efficient, friendly and professional. Issues in my bathroom were resolved in no time. I have relied on Bubby’s Plumbing for 12 years and I have never been disappointed with their excellent and professional service. I have referred them to many friends over the years who are also very pleased and appreciated the recommendation. Thank you Alex and Dan!

reviews.author: Ankit Kapoor
reviews.text: Called Bubby's for an emergency sump pump situation that caused my cold room and basement to flood. I had a tech come out within the hour. Don was amazing, great customer service, new what he was talking about and explained everything at each step. He was able to replace my sump pump and have the water drained within 45 minutes of arriving. I would highly recommend bubby's especially if Don is your tech.

reviews.author: Abedh Sharma
reviews.text:
Alex did an excellent job replacing our main shut-off valve. He was professional, knowledgeable, and took the time to explain everything clearly. The work was done efficiently and with great attention to detail. It’s a huge relief knowing the valve was replaced properly. Highly recommend Alex if you’re looking for a reliable and skilled plumber!
Thank You
Abby and David

reviews.author: andrew lapas
reviews.text:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
Alex and KD were outstanding. They diagnosed the problem within minutes, had it fixed within the hour and left everything spotless. Professional, efficient, and clearly know their stuff. I would recommend Buddy Plumbing Service 100% without hesitation. Thank you, guys!

reviews.author: Karen
reviews.text: I had an outstanding experience with Bubby's Plumbing! They went above and beyond to get the job done efficiently and professionally. From start to finish, they were courteous, knowledgeable, and attentive to every detail. I couldn’t be happier with the results and highly recommend them to anyone in need of a reliable plumber. Truly a 5-star service!”

name: Fowler Plumbing
address: 3215 Jefferson Blvd Unit 301, Windsor, ON N8T 2W7, Canada

reviews.author: Computer Dude
reviews.text:
Seems to me,  after a few quotes, this company is  the most competent bang for the buck you can find... You save money with this outfit.
Got an 'A' series toilet installed,(double or more money than big box stores 'B' series, but better everything),  American Standard Pro Cadet for my daughter to give her piece of mind , that it's good quality,  and done right.

They sent Marco down,  very nice professional young man, easy to  converse with, installed the unit, sealed it all up,(made it look pretty ), fixed the  bit of wobble , new supply line... hauled off the old one....easy peasy for me, lol......all  was good mostly, ....the box had the wrong seat, not a soft close.... pays to pay attention to what you are buying...one call to the office and they  delivered the correct seat next day. We just used the old seat  for now.
Marco is a plumber, not a janitor and I didn't expect him to wash the floor after, lol..it's all good
My daughter had issues with the old one, (probably 40 years old or more), and wanted it gone.
The extra expense getting the A series installed professionally, is worth it for her piece of mind,  knowing it's  top  quality  & all done professionally.
Spend a little more now, for less headaches later.
This new Pro Cadet fit nearly perfect on the floor  over how the old one sat, which had a more square ish front.  Even better, because the base is a touch wider with a much smaller tank and sat evenly on  the new floor.. just a bit more gap behind at he wall..might have to brace it.
Far better performance. Always do your floor first,  THEN  get a new toilet! ( or measure carefully)
I would not hesitate to use Fowler for anything else  plumbing I need in the future.  My new go-to plumbing place!

reviews.author: Pam Campeau
reviews.text: Mason and his apprentice , Mo, came to fix our issue. They were both kind, respectful and very professional. They got the work done in a timely manner and the price was fair. I’ve been using Fowler Plumbing for years and I am always pleased with the quality of their work.

reviews.author: You_Can_Call_Me_Mr.
reviews.text:
I was looking for a reliable company that does plumbing services. I used Chat GBT and I found Fowler Plumbing. I messaged Fowler Wednesday morning through their site and got a reply back on my email less than 10 minutes. Dealt with someone by the name of Alyssa. She asked me some questions on the issue I had and I was set up with an appointment for the next day with a time window 8:30-9:00AM. The day of the appointment, Marco came with someone else never got his name. Anyway I re explained the issue and within less than 45 minutes the issue was repaired and to top it off Marco went above and beyond taking care of some surface rust on the tub where the drain was. Very much appreciated on the great service. Kudos to everyone I dealt with.

Tony DeCiantis

reviews.author: ida iveltri@hotmail.com
reviews.text: We had a plumbing issue in our bathroom and decided to go with Fowler based on the Google reviews. Glad with our choice. Marco and Jack were very professional and explained what was going on and how it would be fixed. Knowing my home is older, Marco put my mind at ease and told me the plumbing in the house doed look good.  I'll definitely use them again when needed.

reviews.author: Laura Rivest
reviews.text:
We have trusted Fowler twice now for our plumbing needs.

They roughed in a new bathroom for us last year and their service was well done.

Just recently our kitchen sinks completely stopped draining and they were able to fit us in with same day availability and solved the issue as quickly as possible. Mason even went as far as to give us best practices/suggestions for how to maintain our specific setup to help prevent future issues and made sure the kitchen was clean and tidy before leaving - nice touch!

Would recommend! Thanks guys!

name: Ole’ Walkerville Plumbing
address: 2666 Turner Rd, Windsor, ON N8W 3L3, Canada

reviews.author: Emily Lockhart
reviews.text: The two plumbers came to fix my pipes that I accidently damaged.  They were fast and went above and beyond to help me.  They even changed the orientation of the pipes to accommodate drywall.  They looked at a few other plumbing things and fixed them with no problem. Good rates, and good results.

reviews.author: Jennifer Zambito
reviews.text:
I recently contacted this plumber about an issue I was experiencing, and they were incredibly helpful and professional from the very start. They took the time to talk me through the problem over the phone, honestly troubleshooting with me instead of rushing to make a service call. That kind of honesty is rare and so appreciated.
They’ve been to my home in the past as well, and every time they’ve been professional, friendly, and reliable. Their pricing is very fair — they don’t overcharge and are completely transparent about costs. It’s clear they take pride in both their work and their customer relationships.
I trust them completely and would recommend their services to anyone looking for a skilled, honest, and reasonably priced plumber.

reviews.author: Rafa Silva
reviews.text:
Alex and his team did a great job installing the sewer system, hot and cold water in my new bathroom. He is very attentive to customer needs. When his crew left the area, it was clean than when they arrived. ☺️
He did a great job, really recommend him and his team. 👊

reviews.author: Lacey Marcoux
reviews.text:
this team here at Ole’ walkerville plumbing is the best ! Recently my boyfriend and I renovated our kitchen. We completely moved the sink and dishwasher to a new location. This process involved some big men working in a tiny crawl space and they handled it like champs. They were very clean and professional as they had come and gone a few times during the renovation, leaving the job site tidy after each visit. From the sink to dishwasher and fridge- each were handled with care and completed to how I imagined. Their work is organized, paying attention to all the finer details. I would highly recommend ole’ walkerville plumbing to anyone who is looking for exceptional services and a superior customer/client experience.
DON’T HESITATE— CHOOSE OLE’ WALKERVILLE PLUMBING !!!

reviews.author: drakebayley1996
reviews.text: Tyler and his crew were fun and happy to help renovate my bathroom that needed a full gut. They worked hard and got the job done in timing with the contractors. Wonderful work.

name: Windsor Urgent Drainage & Electric EEL and plumbing
address: 1475 Martindale St, Windsor, ON N9B 1G4, Canada

reviews.author: Sheikh Chillies
reviews.text: It's great company to work with very reasonable charges friendly dealing Excellent service! The plumber arrived on time, explained the problem clearly, and fixed it professionally. Fair pricing and very honest work. Highly recommended for any plumbing issues.

reviews.author: Abdullah Inam
reviews.text: Exceptional plumbing service! Highly knowledgeable and delivers top-notch work, handled my home with respect and finished the job flawlessly. I highly recommend

reviews.author: Ada Gough
reviews.text: Amazing work they come on time done great plumbing change my plumbing pipes in winter time definitely recommend to everyone

reviews.author: Nasrullah Sharif
reviews.text: I called them for washroom plumbing. I am happy with their work and price. Thank you

reviews.author: Troy Beaudry
reviews.text: Very fast amazing price and professional, I would recommend these guys for all sewer work

name: Plumbing Now
address: 441 Lowes Side Rd, Amherstburg, ON N9V 2Y8, Canada

reviews.author: Amanda Young
reviews.text: Called for last minute plumbing issue, guys showed up and spent 3 hrs cleaning out tree roots from my main line. They were so friendly and helpful! Absolutely recommend this company!

reviews.author: Leya F
reviews.text: Plumbing Now has done multiple jobs in our home for various projects from replacing our sewer line to putting in a new turnoff for the main waterline in our home and today’s visit was to cut and cap a couple waterlines so they’re ready for our new cabinets. They are punctual, reliable and do a great job every time. I highly recommend them.

reviews.author: Adam Gilchrist
reviews.text: We had a truly amazing experience having Plumbing Now complete our plumbing issue. The were very quick to follow up with me from my initial email and they had their team on site at our house within the hour. Their team is very professional and efficient, we would highly recommend their services!

reviews.author: John Bustard
reviews.text: We had some work done recently. They came on short notice and completed the job at hand. When I had an concern about one thing Dave called me promptly and we were able to sort it out to my satisfaction.

reviews.author: Constance Legentil
reviews.text: Tanner and Luca, two very conscientious and efficient workers from Plumbing Now, worked on a pipe blocked by tree roots. They used a camera and eel with different heads. They were persistent despite the cold and were able to clean almost all of the line enabling the toilet to flush again. We appreciated their consistent good work and positive attitude. Thank you for their great service!

name: Superior Plumbing & Home comfort
address: 1965 Ellis Side Rd, Maidstone, ON N0R 1K0, Canada

reviews.author: Eric Morin
reviews.text: Wonderful service from the start! I had texted because I had a mini-split unit that stopped working. They booked the appointment quickly and for a reasonable price. During the appointment I found out my unit was toast, explained what caused it fail and given options for replacement. Joel was extremely thorough and tried his best to get my old unit functional. I found the replacement options to be of reasonable cost, and booked an install with them. Joel and his assistant showed up on time, removed the old unit and installed the new unit and did an excellent job! I would definitely recommend these guys. Top notch service, thanks again guys!

reviews.author: emmett
reviews.text: I had a great experience with Yousef. He was professional, reliable, and clearly knew what he was doing. He arrived on time, explained the issue in a way that was easy to understand, and fixed the problem efficiently. His work was clean and high-quality, and the pricing was fair with no surprises. I really appreciated his honesty and attention to detail. I would definitely recommend Yousef to anyone looking for a skilled and trustworthy plumber.

reviews.author: Julia Cameron
reviews.text:
Superior Plumbing and Home Comfort is hands down the BEST company we have ever worked with. They recently removed our extremely old furnace and central air system and installed a stunning, energy-efficient new system, and the improvement to our home has been absolutely unbelievable. Our house feels completely transformed more comfortable, more efficient, and just better in every way.

Their professionalism, knowledge, and work ethic are truly unmatched. When we also had a main line clog at our rental property, they responded immediately and resolved the issue without delay. Their response time is incredible, communication is clear and consistent, and the text alerts letting you know exactly when the technician is on the way are such a great touch and show how much they respect and prioritize your time.

Veronica and Chelsea were extremely helpful throughout the process friendly, knowledgeable, and always quick to answer questions and keep everything moving smoothly. You can truly tell the whole team genuinely cares about their customers.

What really sets them apart is their honesty, transparency, and hard work. A job in my opinion should have taken two full days was completed in just one day efficiently, cleanly, and with extreme attention to detail. We felt confident and taken care of every step of the way.

We own two homes and would not trust anyone else with our plumbing, furnace, or air conditioning needs. Superior Plumbing and Home Comfort, Josh and all the workers have earned our complete trust and loyalty. If you are looking for a company that truly goes above and beyond, this is the one. Highly, highly recommend.

reviews.author: Geralyn Mady
reviews.text:
Josh, Brandon and the crew replaced a cast iron pipe under the house. They had to contend with in-floor heating pipes which complicated the whole process. The crew was amazing! They are thorough, hard workers with attention to detail. They fixed the problem quickly and efficiently. I would certainly call them in again if the need arises.
Thank you Superior Plumbing for your expertise and great work!

reviews.author: Cindy Karch
reviews.text: We had Marc and Youssef do some work for us. They were on time, stayed in communication to say they were on their way, got the job done thoroughly and promptly. And our German Shepherd even approved of them. Highly recommend, and we'll be requesting them for our next job.

name: Plumb Tech Plumbing
address: 12072 Tecumseh Rd E, Windsor, ON N8N 1M1, Canada

reviews.author: Neal Smaller
reviews.text: Big shout out to Jesse and crew. I have used them for all my plumbing needs big and small.Each project was completed to professional standards which included courteous customer service. Its good to find an honest, reliable company to rely on.

reviews.author: Jeff Galbraith
reviews.text: Friday night came home after a long day noticed my sinks were no longer draining the way they should tried everything to fix the problem myself in a panic I finally called plumb Tech the team took care of me came out the next morning The technician was very polite and knowledgeable. He explained everything he was going to do. To fix our problem, very thorough cleaned up his work area and when that problem was fixed, the technician was kind enough to ask. Is There’s anything else he could do for us. Pump tech was very professional, and I would highly recommend using the Plumb Tech team.

reviews.author: Jagoda Drljevic
reviews.text:
We had a backwater blockage in our kitchen and laundry last night. We called Plum Tech Plumbing this morning, explained the issue, and  they were able to fit us into their schedule. The team arrived promptly, fixed the problem efficiently, and were professional and courteous. Now we can enjoy our weekend- thank you again!
Highly recommend Plum Tech Plumbing to anyone looking for fast, reliable, and quality plumbing support .

reviews.author: mechellemurphy
reviews.text: Loved Connor. Great guy. Worked confidently and was a pleasure. Explained everything and shared the video of the blockage. We will recommend Plumb Tech to anyone looking for plumbing services. .

reviews.author: Darren Varga
reviews.text: Just want to say how helpful and professional your workers are.  This morning my daughter was stuck in the snow with her car and a couple of your guys stopped and pushed her out and kept her safe.  Thanks so much for caring for those in need.

name: Apex Plumbing Inc.
address: 3225 Walker Rd, Windsor, ON N8W 3R7, Canada

reviews.author: Gordana Vuletic
reviews.text: Mike responded to our requests very fast, did new plumbing for kitchen and bathroom sink and reinstalled the toilet that had a broken flange. Mike and his apprentice are effective, efficient,  polite and professional.  Outstanding service and personality.  Highly recommended.

reviews.author: Francois Francis
reviews.text: Mike from Apex Plumbing was always on time, professional and did a great job start to finish. He is very reliable and efficient. I would recommend Apex Plumbing for anyone looking for a trustworthy plumber.

reviews.author: Angela
reviews.text: My laundry tub faucet and pipe were leaking and needed to be replaced. Mike did a great job - he was quick to respond, professional, and efficient at his work. I would definitely recommend Apex Plumbing!

reviews.author: Sherman Markland
reviews.text: Mike was extremely knowledgeable and reliable.  He treated our home as if it was his own. I would heartily recommend Apex and we will definitely use their services in the future!

reviews.author: Colleen Kehl
reviews.text:
I had my sprinkler system closed today.
Afterwards my home filled with a loud noise and all my taps in the baths and both kitchens were vibrating. I had been referred to Mike a few days prior and so I called him.
He was clear that he couldn't make it this evening but would come tomorrow morning.
He told me I could call him tonight if I  was concerned. I did call him and he came. He was like a detective. He followed the noise through the house and took care of the issue, even cutting and capping a line at this hour. It wasn't an emergency. He did it so I could sleep tonight.
His work ethics were very impressionable but his kindness was outstanding.
He has a customer as long as I live in this area.
Sincerely,
Colleen Kehl
Ps. I also told Mike that I had a "whistling toilet" that he attempted to repair last night.  He needed a part that he had used at his last house call so he told me he would be back today in the afternoon. He carries a lot of commonly used parts so he can accommodate his customers quickly.
Mike said he would come this afternoon and and after a confirmation call, he was here at noon and the toilet fixed!
Extremely reasonable and much, much more important, honest and a good person.

name: Windsor Urgent Drainage & Electric EEL and Plumbing
address: 1472 Stoneybrook Crescent, Windsor, ON N9G 2Z4, Canada

reviews.author: Hashwanth chowdary
reviews.text: I had a great experience with the team here. They provided excellent service and were incredibly quick to respond to my needs. The staff was professional, attentive, and made sure everything was handled perfectly from start to finish. I really appreciated the seamless process and the high quality of their work. Highly recommended for anyone looking for reliable and efficient service!

reviews.author: Jigar Patel
reviews.text: Nawaid provided excellent consultation and outstanding service. He was professional, knowledgeable, and ensured everything went smoothly. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Emmaz Rastgar
reviews.text: Excellent service. Unlike other plumbers he reached immediately when we had a water leak even though it was late. He made sure to stop from further damage and do temp fix until next morning. Rates were very reasonable and was very easy to communicate with. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Maple Wn
reviews.text: Amazing service! Nawaid and his team came so quickly and fixed the leakage in our basement. They were super thorough, professional, and explained everything clearly, which made the whole process stress-free. Extremely reliable and definitely recommended!

reviews.author: arsalan hafiz
reviews.text: Really pleased with the shower replacement everything was done carefully, cleanly, and to a high standard. They arrived on time, explained the work clearly, and left the area tidy. Professional, honest service I’d happily recommend.

name: G C drainage electric eel &plumbing
address: 2340 Mark Ave, Windsor, ON N9E 3Y2, Canada

reviews.author: Rajesh
reviews.text: I recently had back water issue in the basement and it was flooded called GC plumbing and had my sewage and water pipes replaced by GC Plumbing, and they did an excellent job! The team worked very hard and completed the entire project in just 4 days. They were professional, efficient, and made sure everything was done properly. I really appreciate their dedication and quality workmanship. Highly recommend GC Plumbing for anyone needing plumbing issues

reviews.author: Chamkaur Sandhu
reviews.text: I needed pumping for my new basement unit, I met almost 5 different plumbers and they all were trying to rip me off, but then I met with GC pumping and he gave me the best price and on top of that he did a 2 day job in just 1 night. Amazing work as well, flawless pipes and everything.

reviews.author: Shahid Hamid
reviews.text:
I called GC Drainage for an urgent drain blockage in my kitchen: water was backing up everywhere.
They responded within 30 minutes, arrived on time, and used their electric eel to clear the main line quickly and efficiently without any mess.

The technician explained everything, fixed a sneaky pipe issue I didn’t know about, and the cost was fair with no hidden fees.

A week later, I had them back for a full electrical check and minor plumbing upgrade in the bathroom, professional, clean work, and super reliable. If you’re in need of drainage, electrical, or plumbing experts, GC is the go-to.
Highly recommend 👍
Shahid H.

reviews.author: Marva Palmer
reviews.text: I needed to have some plumbing work done at my rental condo in Windsor. Muhammad and his team were efficient and kept the work areas clean. Excellent service and great attention to detail. Thank you so much.

reviews.author: Mohamad El korek
reviews.text: I recently bought a house and needed to upgrade the water lines, not only did someone come out the same day, they were also ready to resolve my issue within a day. The showed me what they were doing every step of the way, and there work was extremely clean and thorough. I will definitely call again for any of other water and drainage needs.
